title: Method guide frontmatter
description: Structured metadata carried in the YAML frontmatter of each method.md. Explanatory genre: no supersession or conformance semantics. Validated by scripts/build_manifest.py and CI.

id.description: Stable identifier: 'method:' followed by the folder slug.

summary.description: One-sentence summary used in listings and search results.

version.description: Semantic version of this guide. Methods evolve freely; bump minor for substantive additions.

test_kinds.description: The test kinds this method corresponds to. Primary key for contextual surfacing: a method page lists practices whose applies_to.test_kinds overlap.

sources.description: Structured provenance: the sources this guide is based on. Every guidance document must trace to its evidence. Use role 'adapted' when text, figures, or tables are adapted from a source — that requires the source license and a note describing what was adapted.

related_practices.description: Explicit practice ids beyond the automatic test-kind join (e.g. a data-management practice relevant to this method).

related_protocols.description: BattINFO test-protocol IRIs implementing this method.

role.description: primary: the source the content is built on. background: context and history. adapted: text/figures/tables adapted from it (license + note required). data: dataset used. tool: software the document depends on.

license.description: License of the source material, e.g. CC-BY-4.0. Required for role 'adapted'.

accessed.description: Date the source was consulted. Recommended for web sources.

note.description: What was used from this source. Required for role 'adapted'.
